texto: One of the few advantages of reaching my age is that I've seen it all. Learned not to judge anyone until I've walked in their shoes. That's why we all need friends, isn't it, to help us out with the weak spots? And sometimes the weak spots nobody can see are the ones that hurt the most.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Debbie Johnson que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “One of the few advantages of reaching my age is that I've seen it all. Learned not to judge anyon…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, reflexao, spots, com foco em termino e reflexao.
